name: yc-startup-validator-mcp
description: Y Combinator Startup Validator MCP Server - Get startup validation feedback from YC legends like Paul Graham, Garry Tan, and Jessica Livingston. Features 'Ask Gods' toolset and comprehensive YC-style validation workflows with research-backed insights.
author: B.C. Nims

scripts.build:stdio: npx @smithery/cli@latest build src/index.ts --transport stdio && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' | cat - .smithery/index.cjs > temp && mv temp .smithery/index.cjs && chmod +x .smithery/index.cjs
